healthSummary.summary: Operational source-of-truth has been reset from the example graph. Unity Bridge and Play Mode evidence remain blocked until live Unity connectivity is restored.

nextRecommendedAction.title: Run manual playability review for the Dungeon Recovery first playable.
nextRecommendedAction.reason: Automated Product MVP E2E passed through deterministic hooks; manual player-input feel and UX review are still separate from Public Release readiness.

nodes.title: AInvil reliable game production workflow
nodes.summary: AInvil should present a trustworthy requirement-first workflow from user intent to Unity validation evidence without mixing example fixtures into operational state.

nodes.title: Productization cleanup and E2E validation recovery
nodes.summary: Separate examples from operational state, establish canonical Unity Bridge package paths, and expose an executable dry-run E2E status report.

nodes.title: Minimum AInvil E2E happy path
nodes.summary: Track the minimum production workflow: user request, requirement graph, dry-run Unity change, bridge apply, compile check, Play Mode validation, evidence, traceability, dashboard.

nodes.title: Operational state must not depend on example fixtures
nodes.summary: Runtime reports and release readiness must identify example graph, sample harness, and placeholder evidence as non-operational.

nodes.title: Minimum E2E status must be reportable without mutating Unity
nodes.summary: A CLI-accessible report must classify each happy-path step as Verified, Partial, Blocked, Spec-only, or Deprecated/Sample.

nodes.title: Unity Bridge package and input bridge roles must be explicit
nodes.summary: A canonical Unity Bridge package path and preferred runtime input bridge component must be documented and surfaced in productization reports.

nodes.title: AInvil E2E productization status feature spec
nodes.summary: Operational feature spec represented by productization status reports and CLI commands.

nodes.title: Separate example fixtures from operational source of truth
nodes.summary: Copy example graph and sample scenario to examples and reset state/production_state_graph.json to AInvil productization state.

nodes.title: Generate productization status report
nodes.summary: Create JSON and Markdown reports showing feature statuses, E2E step statuses, release blockers, package roles, and input bridge roles.

nodes.title: Expose productization report through CLI
nodes.summary: Add a CLI command that writes and summarizes productization status.

nodes.title: Restore live Unity Bridge connectivity
nodes.summary: Open Unity, import the canonical bridge package, start the bridge server, and rerun doctor/productization checks.

nodes.title: Canonical Unity Bridge package
nodes.summary: Plugin-local package used as canonical install source.

nodes.title: Runtime-safe input validation bridge
nodes.summary: Codex.UnityBridge.AInvilRuntimeInputTestBridge is the preferred runtime validation component; AInvilInputTestBridge remains compatibility/sample surface.

nodes.title: Productization report classifies the E2E path
nodes.summary: Given AInvil is run from the plugin workspace, when the productization report command runs, then each minimum E2E step has a concrete status and next action.

nodes.title: Unity live checks reach compile and Play Mode evidence
nodes.summary: Given Unity Bridge is reachable, when doctor and live harness run, then compile status and Play Mode validation evidence are recorded.

nodes.title: Static productization status report
nodes.summary: Static report generation can run without Unity and records live Unity blockers separately.

evidence.summary: Generated by productization report command; live Unity validation remains separate.

nodes.title: Example fixtures contaminate operational state
nodes.summary: Example graph and top_down_collectible scenario can make AInvil look more validated than it is for a real project.

nodes.title: Restore Unity Bridge connectivity and rerun productization checks.
nodes.summary: Unity Bridge health, compile check, and Play Mode evidence are currently blocked.

nextAction.title: Restore Unity Bridge connectivity and rerun productization checks.
nextAction.reason: The minimum E2E happy path cannot complete until Unity Bridge is reachable.

nodes.title: Dungeon Recovery Company first playable vertical slice
nodes.summary: Generate and validate the first recovery job in a real Unity project without modifying existing game assets.

nodes.title: First Recovery Job
nodes.summary: A player moves through a small dungeon room, recovers Rubble, CorruptionNode, and BrokenRelic, and reaches Job Complete.

nodes.title: Recover three dungeon targets to complete a job
nodes.summary: The generated first playable scene must contain three recoverable targets, movement, recovery interaction, progress UI, and job completion state.

nodes.title: Create isolated first playable Unity assets
nodes.summary: Generate scripts, materials, and scene under Assets/AInvilGenerated/DungeonRecoveryFirstPlayable only.

nodes.title: Register Product MVP live harness scenario
nodes.summary: Create dungeon_recovery_first_playable_e2e as an Operational ProductMvp UnityFeatureE2E scenario.

nodes.title: Validate first recovery job in Play Mode
nodes.summary: Run deterministic validation hooks in Play Mode and export Product MVP evidence.

nodes.title: Three recovery targets exist
nodes.summary: Given the first playable scene is open, when validation inspects the room, then Rubble, CorruptionNode, and BrokenRelic exist as recovery targets.

nodes.title: Recovery progress UI updates
nodes.summary: Given a target is recovered, when the recovery count changes, then HUD progress updates from Recovered: 0 / 3 through Recovered: 3 / 3.

nodes.title: All recoveries complete the job
nodes.summary: Given all three targets are recovered, when the third recovery is applied, then Job Complete is shown and completion state is true.

nodes.title: Recover target input
nodes.summary: WASD/arrows move the player and E recovers the nearest target; deterministic hooks are allowed for E2E evidence.

nodes.title: DRC_FirstRecoveryJob scene
nodes.summary: Generated first playable scene at Assets/AInvilGenerated/DungeonRecoveryFirstPlayable/Scenes/DRC_FirstRecoveryJob.unity.

nodes.title: Dungeon recovery first playable scripts
nodes.summary: Generated runtime scripts and scene builder for recovery target, player controller, UI view, and game controller.

nodes.title: Dungeon Recovery first playable E2E evidence
nodes.summary: Latest Product MVP live harness evidence for dungeon_recovery_first_playable_e2e.

nodes.title: Run Dungeon Recovery Company Product MVP first playable E2E validation.
nodes.summary: Run live harness for dungeon_recovery_first_playable_e2e and promote Product MVP Ready Candidate only if Passed evidence exists.
